summary: Iteration 147 — Rejection Cost Module fully verified. Backend pytest 16/16 PASS (config endpoint, mappings upsert/list/delete, calculate with PET 7.5+12.25 → 197.50 for qty=10, no-mapping=0, reason_name fallback, /rejection-report enrichment, regression that old /rejection-cost-rules endpoints return 404/405). Frontend 100% — sidebar 'Rejection Cost Config' visible under Production module, page renders with header + 'Add new mapping' card + matrix table, stage dropdown lists all 6 stages from active QC routes ['QC Stage 1','qc1','QC Stage 2','final qc','Labeling','Final QC'], filter dropdown shows 7 options (All + 6), checkbox toggle activates Save button, click Save → 'Saved' toast appears, state persists after reload, Rejection Report has 'COST OF REJECTION' column with '— not mapped' amber labels and ₹ amounts for mapped rows.
critical_code_review_comments: production_qc.py upsert (line 790-848) correctly upserts on (tenant_id, stage_name, reason_id) — keeps same id for repeat POST.
Unknown component keys filtered silently against master rupee components only (line 808-809) — system keys (outbound_logistics_cost, distribution_cost, gross_margin) correctly excluded.
_calc_rejection_cost (line 861-936) uses reason_id preferred + reason_name fallback; both paths verified in tests.
/rejection-report enrichment uses bulk-load of mappings + SKU master values (line 1268-1304) — efficient O(rows) lookup, properly sets cost_of_rejection=0 + missing_mapping=True when unmapped.
Old /rejection-cost-rules endpoints fully removed — regression confirmed via 404/405 in tests.
test_credentials: surya.yadavalli@nylaairwater.earth / test123 (CEO, Nyla Air Water tenant)
seed_data_creation: Tests created/used QC Stage 1 + Black Particles mapping with [primary_packaging_cost, manufacturing_variable_cost]. Tests transiently set PET SKU (ff23d238-07eb-4a5b-98c3-46e268a9e367) cogs_components_values to {primary_packaging_cost: 7.5, manufacturing_variable_cost: 12.25} to make calculate math deterministic. A roundtrip mapping for QC Stage 2 + Cap Issues was created and deleted within the test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression file: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_147_rejection_cost.py — re-run with `pytest backend/tests/test_iteration_147_rejection_cost.py -v`. Note: BatchDetail inline cost preview (mapping × qty, '— not mapped' amber when missing) was NOT directly tested via UI clicks — backend mappings/calculate endpoints that power that preview were thoroughly tested and the Rejection Report (which uses the same enrichment logic) was visually confirmed to render the cost column correctly. Stage dropdown lists 'QC Stage 1','qc1','QC Stage 2','final qc','Labeling','Final QC' — note 'qc1' and 'final qc' are duplicates with different casing, expected since stages come from union of active QC routes.
